query: SELECT id, title, SUBSTRING(audioUrl, 1, 80) as audio_prefix, createdAt FROM tracks WHERE audioUrl NOT LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.root --database frNnwU2pwLKJifDR8KqR7c --execute SELECT id, title, SUBSTRING(audioUrl, 1, 80) as audio_prefix, createdAt FROM tracks WHERE audioUrl NOT LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
